violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on both cafeteria milk coolers. Refrigerator door gaskets must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2024

The dishwasher failed to wash his/her hands between loading soiled and unloading clean dishes from the dishwasher. Food employees must clean their hands after handling soiled equipment or utensils. Proper handwashing procedures were reviewed with employee and PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on milk cooler #1 in the cafeteria. Door gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrective Action - Ice machine is not to be used until, cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2024

The door to the outside, located by the back entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024
Ice machine was observed having a pink substance in the ice machine. Ice machine shall be cleaned and sanitized and maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2023

3 bay sink was observed in poor repair. The middle bay does not drain water, the washing bay would not stay closed and hold water. 3 bay sink shall function per manufacturing instructions. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2023
Refrigerator door gasket On Dairy Chest behind counter was observed in poor repair. Gasket needs to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2023
